$schema_note: Sprint brief for the Sanders Intelligence app. Generated from the approved Hybrid V1 plan.
theme: Hybrid V1: Purchase Orders backed by SellerCloud REST, scoped logistics news feed, and MVP trust fixes

project.name: Sanders intelligence app
project.stack: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite, Tailwind, React Router v6, TanStack Query v5, Supabase, Recharts

tasks.title: Sprint setup and Asana date sync
requirements: Create this sprint brief at D:\Sanders Intelligence\sprints\Sprint_2026-06-10.json.
Update open Asana task due dates to reflect the 2-week Hybrid V1 release window.
completion_criteria: Sprint brief exists and selected Asana tasks have June 2026 due dates aligned to the release.

tasks.title: Fix Inbound ETA baseline
requirements: Estimated arrival month must use latest completed upload uploaded_at plus lt_days.
Keep chart grouping and table Est. Arrival consistent.
completion_criteria: ETA unit tests cover explicit upload baselines and invalid baselines.
Inbound chart and table call the same baseline-aware helper.

tasks.title: Fix Users empty state
requirements: Admin Users page must show an explanatory table-row empty state when no users are returned.
completion_criteria: Static test asserts the empty-state text and colSpan.

tasks.title: Purchase Orders V1
requirements: Add purchase_orders and po_items Supabase tables with purchasing/admin read RLS.
Add sync-purchase-orders Edge Function with SellerCloud REST auth, paginated PO fetch, item fetch, SKU bridge resolution, and admin-only invocation.
Add /purchasing/purchase-orders route for admin and purchasing users.
Add PO hooks, filters, KPI strip, table, admin-only Sync button, and detail modal.
Matched planning SKUs link to Inventory Browser; unmatched SKUs show warnings only.
completion_criteria: Admin can manually sync and browse cached POs.
Purchasing can browse but cannot see the sync button.
Line items show source/planning SKU behavior correctly.

tasks.title: Logistics News Feed V1
requirements: Add news_items Supabase cache with purchasing/admin read RLS.
Add GDELT provider helper and refresh-news Edge Function.
Add /purchasing/news-feed route with search, empty state, and admin-only refresh.
completion_criteria: News feed displays cached logistics/import/export articles.
No browser-side news API key is used.
Provider is isolated so NewsAPI or Mediastack can replace GDELT later.

tasks.title: Mobile responsiveness review
requirements: Review changed surfaces plus Today, Tasks, Inventory, Inbound, Executive, and Admin Users on mobile widths.
Fix functional layout defects in-scope; file follow-ups for broader redesign needs.
completion_criteria: Smoke checks pass at mobile and desktop widths.
Any remaining non-blocking issues are documented.

tasks.title: Regression and release readiness
requirements: Run automated tests and production build.
Run QA_Runbook smoke checks for affected roles.
File follow-up bugs rather than expanding sprint scope.
completion_criteria: npm test and npm run build pass.
Manual QA results are summarized with blockers called out.
